title: Filipino Grilled Snapper
description: A gluten-free Filipino-inspired dish featuring grilled snapper, served with a side of steamed vegetables.

ingredients.name: vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, and snap peas)

instructions: Rinse the snapper fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, garlic, and ginger.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the snapper fillets.
Season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the snapper for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the snapper is cooking, steam the vegetables until tender.
Serve the grilled snapper with steamed vegetables.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
